HOSTEL
MEMORABLE STAY. MEMORIES FOR LIFETIME!
First time away from the comfort of your home?
No worries!
At Sri Eshwar, we understand that your comfort, security and a feeling of positivity is our paramount. Our hostel facility and fellow hostellers will make you feel at home in no time, and you will leave at the end of four years with cherished memories for your lifetime. We ensure our hostels are safe and secure with 24 hours round the clock surveillance.
Our rooms are well planned to ensure students’ stay is comfortable and peaceful. We provide well planned nourished meals with different cuisines like South Indian, North Indian, Chinese etc to satisfy the taste buds of our growing youngsters. With all amenities like men’s salon, ladies beauty parlor, gym, laundry facility, supermarket and food court, our students have everything they need right here in the campus without ever having to step outside! Our hostel is wi-fi enabled too!
Beyond college hours, hostellers can additionally avail the support of residential technical experts, lab facilities and peer-to-peer learning opportunities to fine-tune their skills and gain a leap in their learning curve. Special hackathons are conducted exclusively for hostellers to keep their minds engaged with learning.
What’s more? Fun spaces around the hostel to huddle and have a laugh with friends, exciting events like movie night, DJ dance nights are organized especially for hostellers to keep them relaxed and happy. With sprawling greenery all around the campus, our students can also take nature walks to get the much needed ‘me-time’.
In a nutshell, hostel life at Sri Eshwar is a holistic and memorable experience!
AMENITIES
INDIVIDUAL COTS
WARDROBE
STUDY TABLE
SHOE RACKS
CLEAN BATHROOMS
COMMON LOUNGE
WIFI
GYM
SUPERMARKET
SALOON
LAUNDRY
SOLAR HEATER
FACILITIES
Amenity Centre - Food Court
A great place to grab a bite and relax with friends. Food Court provides many food options and a night restaurant as well.
Supermarket
Available inside the campus is a well-stocked supermarket catering to students’ requirements such as snacks, stationery, toiletries, and more.
Girls Beauty Parlour
Inside the campus, Sri Eshwar has its own beauty parlour to pamper girls with beauty and relaxation. Parlour provides best of hair styling, relaxation massage, waxing, de-tan, threading, facials etc. to groom themselves well
Boys Saloon
A separate saloon is available for boys inside the campus. This is used exclusively by hostellers for haircut, hair styling, relaxation massage etc.
Girls Gym
A separate girls gym is available inside the girls hostel which has a treadmill, cycle, crosstrainer etc, for a quick morning workout.
Boys Gym
Boys gym is equipped with the latest fitness equipment like treadmill, exercycle, body building equipment etc, and a dedicated trainer as well. The gym is available for use during the morning and evening on working days and full day on holidays.
ATM
An ATM facility, which is part of the campus, is helpful for quick withdrawal of cash should the students or visiting parents require.
Gazebos
Gazebos have been built at different places inside the campus as cool hangout spots for the students to relax.
Open Air Theatre
Established in a green ambience, the open air theatre provides ample opportunities for the students to conduct cultural programs, watch movies and hosting interactive programs.
Chat Corner
Feel like grabbing a plate of chaat and chatting with friends? No problem. Hurry to the Chaat corner and have a good time with good food..
Cafe Corner
Hostellers can get a quick bit to eat on the way back to hostel from the college, at our cafe corner. Be it a piping hot cup of coffee or a filling snack before they head back to the hostel to begin their evening routine of studies.
Snack Corner
A hangout for boys hostellers who wish to spend some time after dinner, grabbing a juice or a quick snack and chatting with friends before retiring back to their studies.
Juice Corner
Juice corner is the newest addition to our amenities. Refreshing fruit juices, milk shakes and snacks are served here!
Snack Vending Machine
Vending machine placed inside the Girl’s hostel is apt for students to grab a bite to eat if hungry while studying during late hours.
Copier Centre
As a convenience to our students, a copier centre centrally located, helps students take quick photocopies of  study materials that they require.
Temple
A temple has been established inside the campus to enhance the spiritual quotient of the students.
Extended Learning @ Maker Space
Extended learning facilities are available round the clock for all hostel studies to meet as groups and work on their projects, hackathon ideas and upcoming exams. Dedicated faculty are also available to provide any support required for students.
Extended Learning Code Studio
Code Studio is our state of the art lab that is available for hostellers to prepare for hackathons, or have extended learning sessions with their peers or extended sessions with dedicated faculty members.
A peek into the Boys Hostel
Here’s where friends live together as a family. Right from the wide entry pathways to a welcoming reception, comfortable rooms, open to sky seating areas, the hostel makes Eshwarites adapt to their new lifestyle almost immediately.
Step into the relaxing Girls Hostel
Sri Eshwar always goes the extra mile, to ensure that our facilities are comfortable for our students. The girls hostel is relaxing with the right measures to ensure girls are safe and kept comfortable in every way possible. Right from the beautiful entry pathways lined with benches to chit chat with friends, to a welcoming reception with a hammock, the girls hostel is comfortable and relaxing.
